expected: Production /agent history must be backed by real sessions or not be rendered as clickable history.
Production /agent mini-navigation must navigate to real product routes or not be exposed as fake navigation.

actual: apps/web/src/widgets/landing-agent-demo/components.tsx renders HISTORY_ITEMS from the landing-demo scenario as clickable buttons.

Stamp production messages at creation time and render those timestamps instead of deterministic demo offsets.

regressionRisk: Medium. The production /agent page and landing demo share components; the fix must preserve the marketing demo while removing fake controls from the product route.
